{{Quote|Your wisdom belies your years.|[[Nrin Vakil]]|<ref name="The Phantom Affair">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Phantom Affair]]''</ref>}}
'''Koyi Komad''' was a student in the [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy|Trade and Science Academy]] where she studied [[hyperspatial physics]] under [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] [[Rorax Falken]], with xenopsych as an elective. There she became friends with [[Anki Pace]].

During the [[Phantom Project|Phantom Affair]], while [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] were on their leave, they met Koyi in a local [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], [[The Soundmound]], where she worked as a [[Waiter/Legends|waitress]]. Becoming fast friends, Koyi helped the Rogues escape imprisonment by hiding them in a safe place in the [[Tree/Legends|trees]] above the Academy campus. This adventure helped open her [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] to 'the bigger hologram' and she opted for work-study, eventually joining Rogue Squadron.

At the time of the [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brentaal IV]], Koyi was the Squadron's chief [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]]. Her skills with a [[Hydrospanner/Legends|hydrospanner]] earned her high praise from the always-critical [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo|Plourr]].

She later [[Wedding of Nrin Vakil and Koyi Komad|married]] Rogue [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Nrin Vakil]] and invited Anki to her [[Marriage/Legends|wedding]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Koyi Mateil/Legends|Koyi Mateil]] is incorrectly identified as Koyi Komad in the photo costume gallery in the rear of the ''[[Dressing a Galaxy: The Costumes of Star Wars]]'' book.

Named by the scripter [[Darko Macan]], Koyi Komad was one of the in-jokes by the Croatian author. Just like a number of other characters in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Phantom Affair|The Phantom Affair]]'', her name is actually her description in Croatian, Darko Macan's native tongue. ''Koyi Komad'' translates literally to "What a Babe."
